item.text:
FINDINGS

- `src/ui.rs:1645` identifies the right-pane prompt by truncating at the last line that starts with `chat> `, but `src/cli.rs:1199` appends raw `chat_buffer` after the real prompt marker. If a multiline draft contains a later line beginning with `chat> `, the helper treats that user-entered line as the prompt start and leaves earlier draft lines selectable/yankable. The new regression at `tests/terminal_app.rs:420` covers a multiline draft, but not this user-controlled sentinel case.
